headline: Is APA (APA) Still Slightly Undervalued After Its Strong Recent Share Price Run?
summary: APA overview and recent performance snapshot APA (APA) has drawn investor attention after a mixed set of recent returns, with the stock slipping about 1.5% over the past day and 3% over the past month, yet showing a 52% gain in the past 3 months. Against that backdrop, APA’s current share price of US$40.13 sits alongside a reported value score of 5 and annual revenue of US$8.685b, with net income of US$1.434b. This gives investors a concrete base of fundamentals to weigh against recent price...
